title: Cut over from Supabase to SQLite (no-auth local mode)
description: Replaced Supabase runtime dependencies with local SQLite data layer, refactored routines/workouts APIs, removed auth middleware gating, updated health checks/config/scripts, and removed Supabase package/file footprint.
close_reason: Implemented and verified with tsc + jest: no runtime Supabase imports remain; APIs now use SQLite.

title: Expand trainer personas dataset
description: Populate trainer personas with all profiles from FULL_PRD.md (Jordan, Kai, Morgan, Coach D, Viktor, Jamie, Coach Atlas).
close_reason: Personas updated in src/lib/trainers/personas.ts

title: API: workout logging endpoint
description: POST /api/workouts to log set-level performance tied to routine/exercise/set.
close_reason: POST /api/workouts implemented in src/app/api/workouts/route.ts. Validates payload (routine_id, date YYYY-MM-DD, exercises with sets), verifies routine ownership, stores to routine_workout_logs table. Returns 201 with workout_log_id.

title: Build prompt compiler UI
description: Create a guided prompt-builder page using LLM_PROMPT_LIBRARY and MVP addendum, with persona selection and copy-ready final prompt output.
notes: Implementing prompt compiler UI and prompt composition helpers.
close_reason: Added /prompts page with persona selection and copy-ready compiled prompt output.

title: Align DB for routines + logs
description: Decide table strategy (routines vs workouts JSONB), add migrations if needed, and ensure set-level logging tables support schema.
close_reason: DB aligned: routines table (003_routines_table.sql) stores routine docs as JSONB; routine_workout_logs table (004_routine_workout_logs.sql) stores set-level workout logs with routine_id FK. Both in supabase/migrations/ and src/lib/database/migrations/. RLS policies for user isolation.

title: Remove legacy auth screens/context naming
description: Rename SupabaseAuthContext to neutral local context or remove auth pages entirely for no-auth mode; update tests/imports accordingly.
notes: Removing legacy auth pages/context and stale auth-bound tests.
close_reason: Deleted auth pages/contexts/tests and removed app references to auth layer.

title: API: routine retrieval endpoint
description: GET /api/routines/:id to fetch routine JSON for viewer.
close_reason: GET /api/routines/:id implemented in src/app/api/routines/[id]/route.ts. Returns stored routine payload with routine_id. Auth: 401 if no user. 404 if not found or not owned.

title: API: workout history endpoint
description: GET /api/routines/:id/workouts to return workout history for routine/exercises.
close_reason: GET /api/routines/:id/workouts implemented in src/app/api/routines/[id]/workouts/route.ts. Returns {ok, routine_id, workouts[]} with workout logs ordered by date descending. Auth and ownership checks included.

title: UI: routine list + detail views
description: Create routine list and detail views wired to routine APIs.
close_reason: UI implemented: /routines (list view), /routines/[id] (detail view with collapsible weeks/days/exercises), /routines/import (JSON paste import). Dashboard updated with links to routines.

title: Remove catch phrases from trainer personas
description: Drop catchPhrases from TrainerPersona type and personas data.
close_reason: Removed catchPhrases from TrainerPersona type and personas data.

title: API: routine ingestion endpoint
description: POST /api/routines to validate and store routines, returning routine id and warnings.
close_reason: Implemented POST /api/routines per ROUTINE_API_JSON_SPEC: validate and store routine document, return routine_id and warnings. Migrations: supabase/migrations/20260202000000_routines.sql and src/lib/database/migrations/003_routines_table.sql. Auth: 401 if no user. Envelope (payload + meta) supported.

title: MVP PRD addendum for JSON import
description: Create a new MVP addendum document that reflects revised scope: JSON schema + LLM export prompt + prompt glossary + ingestion API + tracking UI + secure deploy. Keep original PRD unchanged.
notes: Started after bd init; new doc already created at documentation/predev-docs/MVP_PRD_ADDENDUM.md.
close_reason: Addendum created and saved in repo.

title: Harden SQLite persistence and reset tooling
description: Add explicit migration files execution path, DB versioning, and safer reset command cross-platform.
notes: Switching to SQL-file-backed migrations with schema_migrations tracking and cross-platform DB reset tooling.
close_reason: Implemented SQL migration runner, migration tracking table, consistent migrate scripts, and cross-platform db:reset script.

title: Fix test module resolution for @/ paths
description: Add a test tsconfig under src/__tests__ so TS can resolve @/lib/routines/* in tests.
close_reason: Added src/__tests__/tsconfig.json and verified with tsc.

title: README sync for current workflow
description: Update README to reflect current local-first no-auth architecture and beads workflow.
close_reason: README updated for current workflow and testing guidance.

title: Implement routine JSON schema + validation
description: Create schema definition and validator for routine JSON (schema_version 1.0), with clear error reporting.
close_reason: Schema validation already implemented as part of trAIner-al2: src/lib/routines/types.ts and src/lib/routines/validate.ts. Schema version 1.0 with detailed error paths and codes.

title: UI: set-level logging + history
description: Add set-level inputs (weight, reps, RPE/notes) and show recent history per exercise.
close_reason: UI implemented: /routines/[id]/log page with set-level inputs (weight, reps, RPE, notes), day selector, date picker, and history display (last weight per exercise). Saves to POST /api/workouts.

title: Security: basic auth + data isolation
description: Ensure API routes require auth and data is scoped per user; confirm phone-friendly access.
close_reason: Security already in place: (1) All API routes check supabase.auth.getUser() and return 401 if unauthorized. (2) All tables (routines, routine_workout_logs) have RLS policies scoped to user_id. (3) Middleware redirects unauthenticated users to /auth/login. (4) Existing UI uses responsive Tailwind for phone-friendly access.

title: Wire prompt compiler to import flow
description: Add clear handoff UX: compile prompt -> open external LLM -> paste JSON back into /routines/import with validation help.
notes: Wiring prompt compiler handoff into import/dashboard/home UX.
close_reason: Added navigation links and in-page guidance from prompt compiler to import flow.

title: Create LLM prompt library
description: Add prompt library with persona examples and blend prompts for routine generation.
close_reason: Prompt library created at documentation/predev-docs/LLM_PROMPT_LIBRARY.md

title: Update docs for non-invasive workflow
description: Refresh README and predev docs to reflect prompt compiler + paste/import + lift logging product flow and SQLite local mode.
notes: Refreshing README and predev docs for non-invasive flow and local SQLite mode; marking FULL_PRD as historical.
close_reason: Docs now aligned to prompt compiler -> external LLM -> JSON import -> lift logging workflow and current local-first architecture.
